title: geosiris australiensis
intro: Geosiris australiensis, also known as the Australian water lily orchid or snake orchid, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating snake bites, wounds, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Geosiris australiensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Geosiris australiensis is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
